productDisplayName: ADIDAS Red WhirItech Slide M Sandal
description: Designed with a sporty look, these adidas slide-ons are absolutely comfortable and stylish. With quick drying properties, these slides make for great footwear even in wet conditions.UpperNon-absorbent EVA bandage upper for quick drying Fabric lining for comfort Velcro closure on the strap for a customized FitPatented adidas three stripes on the strap for style MidsoleExtra soft massage ribs in midsole for comfortErgonomic design for greater support and comfort to the feetOutsoleInjected EVA outsole for lightweight comfort Diagonal lugs on the periphery of the outsole for absolute grip and traction even on wet surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
